creator: issei@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Update security/bjorb port.

1. bjorb in ports-current needs security/rsaref ports. It makes troubles outside US. 
   So I check USA_RESIDENT macro and determines I should use security/rsaref or not.
2. Update base bjorb version from 0.5.3p1 to 0.5.4p4
3. Change the maintainer's mail address to issei@jp.FreeBSD.ORG. The mail address has
   been changed but the maintainer is still the same person.

Fix: Apply this patch to bjorb in ports-current.
